headline: Does Caterpillar's 8% Dividend Hike Signal More Growth Ahead?
summary: CAT boosts its quarterly dividend 8% to $1.63, notching 32 straight years of hikes as Q1 revenues jumped 22% and backlog hit $62.7B.

headline: CAT Stock Hikes Dividend 8%, Leads Dow Jones Rebound
summary: Caterpillar announced an 8% dividend hike after Wednesday's close, extending its streak of dividend increases to 32 years.  CAT stock led Dow Jones Industrial Average winners early Thursday, rebounding from a key support level after suffering its sharpest loss since April 3, 2025, the day after President Donald Trump unveiled "Liberation Day" tariffs.  Caterpillar is among 69 members of the S&P 500 that have increased dividends every year for the last 25 years.

Caterpillar is among 69 members of the S&P 500 that have increased dividends every year for the last 25 years.

headline: SpaceX Will Destroy Other Stocks. These Could Be the Biggest Losers.
summary: SpaceX  will make Elon Musk a trillionaire (officially).  Space-related stocks are the first place to look for SpaceX-related movements.  “A listed SpaceX does not validate the comps; it benchmarks them,” wrote AgentSmyth, an AI platform designed to bring market intelligence to brokers.

headline: Old Dominion Freight Line, GE Vernova, and Caterpillar Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the CPI report showed 4.2% annual inflation, the highest in three years, with markets fully pricing a December Fed rate hike.
